Клянум се небом да ћу вљубљен у Кину за вјечност.","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/sikNOdQyk3WRoRn73++DyOcFgqCdeTxhg7JniG/bp7","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c6c1f5b5c83b432c8fd530f69b049c81~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776622705&x-signature=PLUqREvOTRgY7%2Fsl8FhezjwbmIM%3D","user_id":"4394117574700285","user_name":"阑朝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4394117574700285","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7601872678189796376","book_info":{"abstract":"被女帝强抢回宫后，我成了她的掌中娇
【女尊+迪化+软饭硬吃+系统+搞笑】  苏尘本是醉仙楼头牌，清冷绝尘，一曲动京华。 为了摆脱命运（其实是为了做任务），他在拍卖会上素衣染血，以死明志。 那一刻，全城落泪，举国皆惊。 微服私访的女帝姬千雪，看着那个在血泊中依然高傲的灵魂，眼红了，也疯了。 “一百万两黄金！朕买他的命！” 她不顾世俗眼光，将他强行裹入龙袍，带回深宫，日夜独宠。 …… 后来。 前线大捷，镇国将军秦无双提刀杀回京城：“昏君！把你抢走的人还给我！” 当朝帝父挡在寝宫门口：“谁敢动哀家的干儿子？” 而在龙榻之上，女帝看着一心只想寻死的苏尘，眼角猩红，声音沙哑： “苏尘，你若敢死，朕就让这天下给你陪葬！” “看着朕！这辈子，下辈子，你都只能是朕一个人的！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2of7719325a171e8256c38c4a90fa92bd2~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"烟锁池柳柳","author_id":"","book_id":"7601872678189796376","book_name":"女尊：求死不成，女帝逼婚","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":843,"name":"迪化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=843&name=迪化&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7601872740231954968","read_count":"20481","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"391715"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"105","tags":"玄幻脑洞,架空,开局,多女主,系统,迪化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7ba1f5aba231ebf8693dd8e0f0333e87~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779254043&x-signature=CHNDQsR6AtLaWZZR%2FDp1klvmDvY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3861916921374671","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"35"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211314024ED8DD895EDE1A040A67"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,
